{"id":"wr-6jt","title":"🤝 HANDOFF: Continue with P5 Hardening","description":"## Context

P1-P4 all shipped and pushed to main. Faultline is a self-hosted Sentry-compatible error tracker (Go + Dolt).

## What's done (P1-P4)
- P1: Ingest (envelope/store endpoints, DSN auth, fingerprinting, sessions)
- P2: Read API (REST endpoints for issues/events), Dolt 60s commit loop, rate limiting
- P3: Gas Town integration (bead creation 3+/5min, resolution polling, 24h regression)
- P4: Dashboard (templ+htmx, auth/sessions, seismograph/fault report/core sample views)

## Next: P5 Hardening

Per README and design brief, P5 includes:
- Data retention/TTL (auto-delete old events)
- PII scrubbing (strip sensitive data from error payloads)
- OAuth/OIDC (GitHub, Google login)
- API tokens (scoped per project for agents/CI)
- Self-monitoring (dogfooding)
- Docker packaging (Dockerfile + compose with Dolt sidecar)
- Slack plugin (channel notifications for error activity)

## Unread mail
Two FYI notifications from gastown/beercan about upstream fixes (gt-kvf, gt-d5w). Read them before going idle.

## Key files
- README.md — phase table, architecture overview
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — 6 ADRs
- docs/DESIGN-BRIEF.md — brand identity, dashboard UX spec
- docs/SDK-COMPATIBILITY.md — SDK support matrix
- internal/ — all Go packages (api, dashboard, db, gastown, ingest, server)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"faultline/bugspray","owner":"jeremy@theirish.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T05:15:43Z","created_by":"faultline/bugspray","updated_at":"2026-03-24T05:15:43Z"}

{"id":"wr-qal","title":"🤝 HANDOFF: Witness handoff: Dolt crash-loop diagnosed, multiple infra incidents","description":"EXTRAORDINARY ACTIONS THIS SESSION — Handoff required.

WHAT WAS DONE:
1. crystallizes column added to wandering_river/.beads/dolt/beads (local DB, working copy) — may not be committed
2. gt binary panic FIXED by Mayor (commit 8e8403e6, duplicate port flag removed)
3. Competing gt dolt start processes killed (were caused by background tasks)
4. Escalated to Mayor: wr-wisp-63z (gt panic), also mailed Mayor

ONGOING ISSUES:
- Dolt crashes due to beads journal corruption — needs human repair (truncate or dolt revert on .dolt-data/beads)
- wr- prefix bd show routing broken (reads fail, writes work)
- mail inbox failing: 'crystallizes could not be found' even after fix

CURRENT STATE: 0 polecats, theoutlived quiet. Deacon+Mayor alive. {"id":"wr-cl7","title":"🤝 HANDOFF: Dolt recovery - monitor stability","description":"Patrol cycle 5: Dolt server was down (stale PID 57268). Recovered successfully via 'gt daemon stop \u0026\u0026 gt daemon start \u0026\u0026 gt dolt start'. All 14 databases verified and healthy. However, database state corruption from previous fsck+journal-revive is causing ID resolution ambiguity in mail inbox - message reads/deletes fail with 'ambiguous ID' errors. This is a secondary issue from the journal recovery procedure.
